title: QFINHUB Business Goal Tracker — Phase 15 Autonomous OS

month_1.actual: COMPLETE — 125 calcs audited, 100 GSC UI URLs, 7 Tier 3 batches (70/105), 1 content page, 45 internal links

target_a_traffic.honest_assessment: OFF-TRACK. Current traffic is ~0. GSC shows 100 impressions/week across 20 pages, ALL 0 clicks. To reach 5,000 visitors by Jul 3, we need to go from 0→167 visitors/day in 29 days. This requires ranking core calculators in top 10 for high-volume finance terms — not just long-tail blog queries.

month_1_2.status: IN PROGRESS — ads.txt live, awaiting AdSense review

target_b_revenue.honest_assessment: OFF-TRACK. 0 revenue, 0 traffic, AdSense not yet approved. Need both traffic AND AdSense approval to generate first dollar.

google_search.top_query: "20000 loan at 8 percent for 5 years" — 59 imp, 0 clicks

bottleneck_analysis.biggest_blocker: NO TRAFFIC — pages exist and are indexed (10 T1 confirmed), but ranking positions are too deep (pos 86+ for core terms)
root_causes: DOMAIN AGE — site is 32 days old. Google sandbox likely in effect
AUTHORITY — 0 backlinks, 0 referring domains. No external trust signals
COMPETITION — finance niche is extremely competitive. Mortgage calculator has established players (nerdwallet, bankrate, zillow)
CONTENT DEPTH — 125 calc pages exist but may lack sufficient supporting content for topical authority
CTR — Pages at pos 86+ get zero clicks even if indexed
remedies: BACKLINKS — Outreach for at least 10-20 referring domains in Month 2
CONTENT CLUSTERS — Build supporting blog/guide/decision content around top 5 calculators
INTERNAL LINKS — Maximize internal link flow to T1/T2 calculators
SOCIAL SIGNALS — Pinterest pins (when safe) or other social platforms for brand signals
TECHNICAL — Ensure all pages have schema markup, fast LCP, mobile-friendly

daily_actions_default: Tier 3 calculator GSC UI indexing (10/day until all 125 complete)
Technical health check (ads.txt, analytics, sitemap, hubs)
Query opportunity engine (find zero-click, near-winner pages)
CTR fixes (up to 10/day on non-cooldown pages)
